task: Fix CodeRabbit Feedback on PR #2188 (Staleness Indicator)

issues_fixed.description: Removed isSuggestionStale export from package root (server-only function)
issues_fixed.fix: Removed export line, added comment: isSuggestionStale is server-only — import via '@kit/mastra/persistence'

issues_fixed.description: Staleness math could show invalid negative 'X edits ago'
issues_fixed.fix: Changed !== to < for staleness check; wrapped stalenessEdits calculation in Math.max(0, ...) to ensure non-negative

issues_fixed.description: Staleness check triggered on any version mismatch instead of only when current is newer
issues_fixed.fix: Changed !== to < so only stale when suggestionVersion < currentStoryboardVersion

issues_fixed.description: Singular count showed '1 edits ago' instead of '1 edit ago'
issues_fixed.fix: Added ICU plural forms: {{count, plural, one {# edit ago} other {# edits ago}}}

notes: Fixes were already committed and pushed in commit 163b5af96. All 4 CodeRabbit issues have been addressed.
